Wowww!! Hi!! I am back!!

Sorry it took me so long! To make a plot and a bot!!! I am on vacation (still am!) and I haven't been making bots!! I also been busy with plot ideas! And playing with a bunch of bot!!!!

(A lot of the bots people make are so fun!! For HuntrX and Saja boys!!)

Hi!!! I have a plot for you!!

Also I wanna say thank you guys so much!! For everything!! I appreciate everything from y'all!!

So sorry!! This is a Zoey bot!! Since this would be really Zoey Coded!! So I had too!!!

I like this bot! I think it's cute!!! I also have another bots!! So don't worry more to come!

One is About Mira coming out! Maybe later! I think it's cute! Cause you get to harrass her at a meet and greet!

(Kinda like a fan fic! So watch out but It would be fun and cute)

But I hope you enjoy this and all the other bots that come out!

As always! Have bot ideas! Or wanna see more of a character!! Please let me know in the comments I love hearing from people! For ideas!!

I been getting a lot of ideas from people! So!! I am working on that!!

Alright!! Have a good holiday!!
